calendar.matters:
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing
Off Calendar Nov-19-2012 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This matter was heard with case number PCN-12-295558 Conservatorship of Leland Spiegelman.

Appearances: Christopher Cole for and with Leland Spiegelman. Caroline Hinshaw Court appointed Counsel for and with Leland Spiegelman (Conservatee). Nancy Rasch for Debra Dolch (Temporary Conservator of the Estate). Steve Pollak for Mark Speigelman. Ernest Der for Heide Feldman and Roxanne Cohn.

None of the Parties are objecting to the accounting petition. The Court approved the accounting petition (subject to review of the order). The only fee petition that any of the Parties are objecting to is Mr. Der's fee petition. Mr. Cole and Mr. Der presented oral argument to support their positions with regard to said fee petition. Mr. Coles', Mr. Pollak's and Ms. Hinshaw's fee petitions are granted (subject to review of the orders). Mr. Der's fee petition is also granted subject to the Court's review of the amounts and the Court making any appropriate adjustments. The status hearing in the Cohn matter 295552 is off calendar.

Judge: Peter Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing
Off Calendar Nov-14-2012 Continued To Nov-19-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION By Principal To Determine Whether Power Of Attorney Is Terminated
Off Calendar Jun-04-2012 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Christopher Cole for and with Leland Spiegelman (Petitioner). Caroline Hinshaw for and with Leland Spiegelman as Court appointed Counsel in the Conservatorship matter case number 295558. Nancy Rasch for and with Debra Dolch (Temporary Conservator of the Estate). Ernest Der for Roxanne Cohn and Hiedi Feldman (Objectors).

Ms. Hinshaw suggested that the petition be amended to include a Health Care Directive and stated that she would like to see the matter mediated. Mr. Der expressed his Clients concerns with regard to Mr. Cole's involvement and Mr. Speigelman's capacity. Counsel discussed the matter outside of the courtroom. Upon returning, the Parties informed the Court that they agreed to participate in Pro Bono Mediation. Mr. Der stated that he was only able to speak with one of his Clients (Ms. Feldman) but that he was okay with going forward with mediation. The Court signed the order referring the matter to Pro Bono Mediation. Mediation must be completed no later than July 23, 2012. The Parties are to notify the Probate Examiner as to the outcome of mediation. The Petition by Principal to Determine Whether Power of Attorney is Terminated was taken off calendar without prejudice as moot. Status of mediation was set for August 2, 2012 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 in the Conservatorship matter (295558). The Temporary Conservatorship was extended to August 2, 2012. The hearing on the general Conservatorship petition was continued from June 21, 2012 to August 2, 2012 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The Motion for Order Staying Depositions on calendar for June 13, 2012 in the Conservatorship matter was continued to August 16, 2012 at 2:00 p.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Peter Busch. Court Reporter: Mary Dutra, CSR 251. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.

PETITION By Principal To Determine Whether Power Of Attorney Is Terminated
Off Calendar May-14-2012 Continued To Jun-04-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
